◎简　　介  

　　Brolga is a tough Australian who lives in the desert outback with a mob of orphaned kangaroos. He is mum to three baby joey's that live in his tin shack with him. His hope is to raise and return them to the wild - but one has fallen seriously ill and may not make it. Written by BBC
